a.xlink:title: The C3D20 class defines C3D20 C3D20R elements.
The C3D4 class defines C3D4 elements with non-linear support.
The C3D8 class defines C3D8 C3D8R elements.
The C3D8I class defines C3D8I C3D8IR elements.
The CIN3D8 class defines CIN3D8 CIN3D8R elements.
The DC3D4 class defines DC3D4 elements.
Label objects that cannot be copied.
